chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 194 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.11.2025. Mr. Ahsan Gul Dahri, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Hashim Leghari, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 8. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = Counsel for the respondents No.4 to 8 has submitted a statement alongwith certain documents which is taken on record and supplies copy to learned A.P.G and counsel for the applicant. Meanwhile, counsel for the applicant has submitted certain medical record in relation to FIR No.40/2025 which are also taken on record. He undertakes to supply copy during course of the day. Counsels as well as learned A.P.G have completed the arguments. Counsel for applicant has also relied on the judgments reported as Syed Qamber Ali Shah v. Province of Sindh and others (2024 SCMR 1123), Arsalan Raza v. Justice of Peace and others (2024 P.Cr.L.J 351) and Tariq Saddique Khokhar and 5 others v. Additional Sessions Judge, Lahore and 3 others (2006 P.Cr.L.J 622). Counsel for the respondents requests for time to submit some reported case law which he undertakes to do so in day or two. Heard and Reserved. JUDGE Tufail
